title: desmodium triangulare
intro: Desmodium triangulare, also known as Triangle Vine or Wild Sensitive Plant, is a tropical legume native to Central and South America, characterized by its unique ability to fold its leaves when touched or disturbed. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Desmodium triangulare include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Desmodium triangulare can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of ailments.
